---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## What did you expect?

What should have happened instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open Meridian
2. Click ...
3. See ...

## Environment

- macOS version: (e.g. 14.4.1)
- Meridian version: (see *Settings → About*, or the commit you built from)
- Installed via: `make install` / manual Xcode / other
- Plan type on claude.ai: Free / Pro / Max / Team

## Screenshots or logs

If helpful, attach a screenshot of the menu bar / popover and any relevant output from `Console.app` (filter by `subsystem:com.quentindecobert.meridian`).

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing.
